name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N)+1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \land Len(q) = 0
       /\ head \in 1..K
       /\ tail \in 1..K
       /\ count \in 0..K
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
                /\ head' = head
                /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
                /\ count' = count + 1
                /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, count>>

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
                /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
                /\ tail' = tail
                /\ count' = count - 1
                /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, count>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHANNEL_CAPACITY)
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 
        /\ i \notin {j \in 1..Len(sent_chunks) |-> sent_chunks[j] = i}
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) : 
            /\ sent_chunks[j] = i
            /\ retransmit_count[j] < MAX_RETRIES
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
            /\ retransmit_count' = 
                [k \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) |-> 
                    IF k = j THEN retransmit_count[k] + 1 ELSE retransmit_count[k]]
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        \/ /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
            /\ retransmit_count' = 
                [k \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) |-> 
                    IF k = i THEN 1 ELSE retransmit_count[k]]
            /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 
        /\ i \in {j \in 1..Len(sent_chunks) |-> sent_chunks[j] = i}
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = 
            [k \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) |-> 
                IF k = i THEN retransmit_count[k] + 1 ELSE retransmit_count[k]]
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
    \/ /\ channel' = <<>>
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

====
